name: report_delay_model
full_help:
report_delay_model

Description: 
Report settings affecting timing analysis

Syntax: 
report_delay_model  [-file <arg>] [-append] [-return_string] [-all] [-quiet]
                    [-verbose]

Usage: 
  Name              Description
  -----------------------------
  [-file]           Output the results to file
  [-append]         Append the results to file, don't overwrite the results 
                    file
  [-return_string]  return report as string
  [-all]            report all configuration settings (by default, only the 
                    typically important settings are reported
  [-quiet]          Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]        Suspend message limits during command execution

Categories: 
Report, Timing

arguments.description: Append the results to file, don't overwrite the results file
report all configuration settings (by default, only the typically important settings are reported
Suspend message limits during command execution
